message:
test(state): add error checking to test setup code

Adds proper error checking for CreateSession, CreateAgent, CreateTask,
CreateReservation, CreateApproval, UpsertToolHealth, UpdateReservation,
and LogEvent calls in test setup code to ensure test failures produce
clear error messages rather than silently proceeding with nil values.
